products.name: One Piece Boah Hancock HQS+ 1/4 Statue 51cm (New)
products.description:
One Piece Statue of Boa Hancock in HQS+ collection, 1/4 scale size approx.51cm. Official product in limited edition by Tsume.

I could do the worst atrocities in the world, I'll always be forgiven Do you know why? Because I AM the most beautiful woman theyve ever seen!Boa Hancock, Amazon Lily Empress, captain of the Kuja pirates crew.

With the "Snake Princess " Boa Hancock, second of the Seven Warlords, after Trafalgar D. Law, in our One Piece HQS + by Tsume collection, Tsume offers One Majestic Piece.

This HQS + statue by Tsume reflects the destructive power that Boa Hancock exerts on men, who, stunned by such beauty, literally fell down at her feet, being instantly turned to stone ... Beautiful to die for, her piercing eyes of a blue as dark and icy as the abyssal depths, does not show any emotion. Meanwhile, her snake Salome reveals a sharp smile by encircling the victims bewitched by the captivating beauty of the inaccessible Boa Hancock. Unable to resist the temptation, her prey are trapped, petrified by the absolute power of her devils fruit!

We depicted her in the same way as she appears in the Marine Ford's Arc, accompanied by her faithful snake Salome. Standing on one leg, with her flowing hair and resolute gaze, Boa emanates as much charm as power, honoring her Empress status. The composition of the statue, from the character balance to the snake entanglement, adds movement to this special piece. A feeling enhanced by the draped tissue of Boa's dress as well as her voluminous hair thrown back with a dismissive gesture of her left hand. At her feet are two pirates turned into stone, a Slave Arrow right into their heart. On the base, the frozen waves are a reference to Admiral Aokijis intervention at the start of the Marine Ford war. Finally, you will find the symbol of the Kuja pirates as well as a purple strip to recall Boa's outfit.

On both artistic or technical sides, Tsume offers a majestic piece worthy of such an empress ... and her most uncompromising fans!

The statue comes with a numbered plate and a certificate of authenticity.

Total run of 2.500 pieces.

Characteristics:

Artistic direction: Saesa Kiyokawa, Cyril Marchiol

Concept art: Giorgia Lenzi

3D sculptors: Muhammet Ay, Olivier Sam, Patrick Tran

Technical engineering: Muhammet Ay, Jose Ku Chio Lu

Statue preparation: Tom Fargnier, Mickael Gros

Painting: Mickael Gros, Éric Jolivalt, Aurélie Nagot, Laurent Roussel

Scale: 1/4

Size: L: 44 cm / P: 40 cm / H: 51 cm

Materials: Polyresin, PU, PVC, ABS, magnets

products.name: One Piece Trafalgar D. Water Law HQS+ Statue Tsume Art 47cm (New)
products.description:
Tafalgar Law, whose real name is Trafalgar D. Water Law, is the first character of One Piece to join the HQS + by TSUME range!

Also called the "Surgeon of Death", he ate the Fruit of the Scalpel, which allows him to create a translucent sphere in which he can control the position of any objects and living things. He will be given the title of Grand Corsaire by the Marine, but will be deposed after he allied with Luffy.

The captain of the crew of the Heart is represented here during his passage on the island of Green Bit, while he awaits the arrival of Donflamingo, the heart of Caesar Clown in his hand.

Particular attention was paid to the realization of Green Bit's vegetation, like the bright colors and the huge plants. Sitting in the middle of this luxuriant vegetation, Law waits, a sly smile on the lips. The 1/4 scale allowed us to accentuate the details, be it the texture of the hat, the transparent leaves or the fineness of his tattoos.

The final touch to this composition is the sphere available as an option to visualize the space created by its fruit of the demon.

The statue comes with a numbered plate and a certificate of authenticity.

Scale 1/4 Total run of 1800 pieces.

Size: H: 46,8 cm/ D: 42,9 cm / W: 47,6 cm

©  Eiichiro  Oda/Shueisha,  Toei  Animation

products.name: My Hero Academia Statue 1/6 Stain Ikigai by Tsume 43cm
products.description:
My Hero Academia statue of Stain in Ikigai collection, 1/6 scale size approx.43cm. Official product in limited edition of 400 pieces by Tsume Art.

My Hero Academia is back in Ikigai with Stain, the legendary Hero Killer! This incredible statue captures the character in a scene from his battle with Shoto, where his power and determination are revealed with striking intensity.

This My Hero Academia statue highlights Stain’s fierce combat, capturing his piercing gaze and fighting stance. His expression of defiance and conviction is beautifully conveyed, bringing his character to life in a unique way.

Stain's face sculpture, with his sharp features and ruthless gaze, emphasizes the uncompromising nature of the Hero Killer.

Every detail, from the blood on his costume to the precision of his weapons, makes this statue a "must-have" for any My Hero Academia fan.

The dynamism of this MHA statue freezes the moment of the battle. Stain's predatory attitude is captured with fidelity, paying tribute to the brutality of his character.

Dimensions : 18 cm 36 cm 43 cm

products.description:
Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba statue of Tanjiro Kamado in Ikigai collection, 1/6 scale size approx.44cm. Official product in limited edition of 1500 pieces by Tsume Art.

Enter the world of Demon Slayer with this Tanjiro Kamado Ikigai statue. Be transported straight into the heart of the action, in one of the anime’s most intense scenes. Facing Rui, a formidable member of the Twelve Demon Moons, Tanjiro unleashes a spectacular technique: the Dance of the Fire God.

This unique piece captures the energy, strength, and emotion of this legendary battle. Standing 44 cm tall with striking dynamism, this statue is not just a collectible—it’s a piece of Kimetsu no Yaiba history.

Tanjiro’s determined gaze reflects the full force of his will as he unleashes the Dance of the Fire God for the first time with power and mastery.

The blazing dragon of the Hinokami Kagura attack comes to life through the sculpt’s finesse and the precision of the paintwork, blending beauty and power in a truly memorable scene.

Every meticulous detail highlights the statue’s dynamism, from the swirling flames to the finely crafted textures, perfectly capturing the intensity of this epic moment.

Width: 18 cm

Depth: 38 cm

Height: 44 cm

Why be stuck one way, when you can do it all? Here comes the Sanemi Shinazugawa BUZZmod. Action Figure!

The BUZZmod 1/12 scale action figure line presents Sanemi Shinazugawa from the hit anime series Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba.
Extensive research and development led us to create the ultimate posable figure!
The Sanemi Shinazugawa BUZZmod includes four interchangeable face parts to capture his many moods. The haori is uniquely shaped with a core to secure movement enabling natural poses.
Some of the effects inspired by techniques also feature movable axes, allowing them to change shape according to movement.
In addition to the Nichirin sword, two extra wooden swords are included! It's possible to recreate Sanemi's various scenes in the "Hashira Training Arc".
Of course, the familiar "seiza parts" that are a common element of BUZZmod Demon Slayer series are also included! From sitting, to kneeling, to leaping into action the poses are limited only by your imagination!
The BUZZmod.'s figure line keeps expanding! Please enjoy these wonderfully detailed action figures and add Sanemi Shinazugawa to your collection today!

products.description:
Demon Slayer Kimetsu no Yaiba Figure of Genya Shinazugawa in FiguartsZERO collection, size approx.17cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.

Genya Shinazugawa, the lone warrior at the heart of the Demon Slayer series, is much more than just a demon slayer. The younger brother of Sanemi Shinazugawa, the Pillar of the Wind, Genya is a complex character, marked by a tragic childhood that led him to become a demon hunter. Gifted with an iron will and unfailing determination, he stands out for his unique ability to consume demon parts to borrow their powers, a technique that makes him as powerful as he is enigmatic. His quest for vengeance leads him down a path strewn with pitfalls, but it's his evolution, his courage in the face of adversity, and his decisive contribution to the fight against Muzan Kibutsuji that capture the hearts of fans. Genya, a tragic hero, demonstrates that beyond strength, it is the power of the human spirit that is most remarkable.

The forward leaning pose and the effect pedestal express the "movement" that confronts the demon, and the calm expression that faces the demon expresses the "stillness".

The haori, which has a fine pattern and is characteristic, has been vividly and delicately reproduced, and the corps uniform has been carefully made to not be monotonous by adding shadows and wrinkles.

Please enjoy 'Giyu Tomioka', full of dynamism, at hand.

The DX Ver. Is a luxurious pedestal that expresses a swirling effect.

This fully painted figure stands 29 cm tall.
